problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
